title: Da Nang、Da Nang — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Da Nang、Da Nang的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Da Nang是Da Nang的一個城市，人口約1,200,000。A rapidly growing coastal city with stunning beaches, a modern skyline, and a thriving digital nomad community, often ranked among Vietnam’s most livable cities.
